style_note: Tile Africa's own name for what the UI placeholder called 'Vintage' - soft classic look, slipper baths, VitrA Valarte furniture in matt ivory/grey, classic chrome tapware with hand showers.
known_gaps: Tile Africa's Vintage Romance bathroom sub-listing has no toilets, tapware, shower heads, towel rails or built-in baths - those categories were style-matched from their wider catalogue on 2026-07-10 (round/classic shapes, chrome, hand-shower kits for the slipper baths) - same approach as Modern Metro's wall tiles. Prices are real and current; the style pairing is our curation, not Tile Africa's tagging.
Built-in baths come from the general built-in baths category - Tile Africa does not tag any built-in bath to a style collection.
Wall tile budget and mid are the same price (R189.99/m2) - both are real entry-level 300x600 matt ceramics.
The VitrA Valarte vanities are premium European units (R14.5k-R26k) - this style has no true budget vanity; the cheapest real option is used as 'budget'.
A Mystic Interlock glass & marble mosaic exists in the style's range but is sold per 300x300mm sheet, so it is excluded from per-m2 quoting.

Storage: not tagged to style collections by Tile Africa - storage_compact/storage_full sourced from the wider catalogue on 2026-07-10, matched by finish (matt ivory, same VitrA Valarte line already used for this style's mirror category). Two size bands per tier - storage_compact for bathrooms under 6m2 floor area, storage_full at 6m2 and above. The compact-budget option (Croydex corner basket) is a neutral catch-all used across all 6 styles at this tier.
